cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: The assistant combines offline document intelligence with deterministic business tools for profit, margin, discount, invoice total, and payment-term analysis. This is load-bearing because SME users do not only need document Q&A; they also need reliable business arithmetic and operational decisions that should not be guessed by the language model.

test_prompts.prompt: What is the payment period in the supplier agreement?
How long do customers have to return unopened retail items?

_runtime.hardware_target: local CPU laptop, no GPU required
_runtime.notes: Operational block (underscore-prefixed) consumed by the ADTC profiler; stripped from the validated submission section. Place the GGUF model at models/model.gguf before profiling.
